SAFWANA NASRIN
Security Analyst
+917012455456
safwananasrinnn@gmail.com
Kasaragod , Kerala , India
www.linkedin.com/in/safwananasrin
https://github.com/SafwanaNasrin
SUMMARY
Proactive and results-driven Security Analyst with hands-on experience in safeguarding networks, systems, and data through continuous monitoring, risk analysis, and threat mitigation. Expertise in conducting security audits, managing incident response, and supporting regulatory compliance. Known for a strategic mindset, strong problem-solving skills, and a passion for staying ahead of emerging cybersecurity trends. Committed to strengthening organizational security posture through innovative and practical solutions.
SKILLS
  • Tools : Burp Suite , Nmap , Nessus, Metasploitable , Frida , MobSF , Acunetix.
  • Languages : Python , PHP, SQL, HTML, C, C++,CSS,Javascript
  • Operating Systems : Kali Linux, Windows.
  • Framework : OwASP
  • Virtualization : VirtualBox , VMWare , Genymotion , Android Studio.
  • VAPT : Manual Testing , Scripting and Automation.
  • Soft Skills : Communication Skills , Ethical Mindset , Leadership , Adaptability
PROJECTS

    202520242023202220212020201920182017201620152014
    Sub-Domain Enumeration:
    • An advanced , feature-rich Bash Script for discovering and validating live subdomains effortlessly.
    • Created a subdomain enumeration script using Assetfinder , Sublist3r, and Htpprobe for automated subdomain discovery and live domain validation.
    • Checked live subdomains using httprobe to identify active attack surfaces for further security assessment.

    User Choice Encryption:
    • Major modules are Admin , User(Web) , User(Android). The iterative enhancement model is an iterative and incremental approach to software development.
    • Aims to develop a secure file storage and sharing application that prioritizes data privacy through robust encryption techniques.
    • Frontend : Python , PHP , JAVA.
    • Backend : MySQL.

      202520242023202220212020201920182017201620152014
      Built a terminal-based scanner to detect phishing URLs using keyword analysis. Implemented input validation, color-coded alerts, and logging of scan results .Supported custom keyword lists and timestamped scan tracking for audits.
      • Python – Core programming language for building the scanner logic
      • colorama – For color-coded terminal output (user-friendly alerts)
      • logging module – To record warnings, info, and errors in a log file
      • datetime module – For generating timestamped scan results
      • os and sys modules – For file handling and graceful exits
      • Command-Line Interface (CLI) – Lightweight, cross-platform interaction
      • Text file handling – Load phishing keywords and save scan results (.txt)

            ACHIEVEMENTS
            • Completed 50+ hands-on labs on TryHackMe covering network scanning, Privilege escalation , and Web security
